offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual tracking causes late orders. We automate payment schedules instead of manual tracking.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Participate in community forums for tool sharing
try_it: Let users try generating payment schedules and sending reminders
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
